assets.usage: Use for top-left Sanofi brand lockup in admin HTML. Do not recreate the logo with text, CSS dots, or inline glyphs.

rules: Logo must be referenced from the fixed brand asset package.
Renderer must mark visible logo usage with data-brand-asset-id="sanofi-logo-full".
Do not render the Sanofi logo as .brand-word, text-only markup, or handwritten vector unless it is the fixed asset file.
